import java.lang.reflect.Member;
import java.lang.reflect.Modifier;

public class ReportService {

    // Pattern to validate safe OGNL expressions (property navigation only)
    // Allows: name, user.name, profile.role, items[0], map['key']
    private static final Pattern SAFE_EXPRESSION_PATTERN = 
        Pattern.compile("^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*(\\.[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*|\\[\\d+\\]|\\['[a-zA-Z0-9_]+'\\])*$");
    
    // Whitelist of allowed classes
    private static final Set<String> ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES = new HashSet<>();
    private static final ClassResolver SECURE_CLASS_RESOLVER;
    private static final MemberAccess SECURE_MEMBER_ACCESS;

    static {
        // Initialize allowed classes - only model classes and basic Java types
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("com.example.model.User");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("com.example.model.Profile");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.lang.String");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.lang.Integer");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.lang.Long");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.lang.Boolean");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.lang.Double");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.lang.Float");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.lang.Number");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.util.Date");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.math.BigDecimal");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.util.ArrayList");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.util.HashMap");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.util.List");
        ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.add("java.util.Map");
        
        // Secure ClassResolver that only allows whitelisted classes
        SECURE_CLASS_RESOLVER = new ClassResolver() {
            @Override
            public Class<?> classForName(String className, Map context) throws ClassNotFoundException {
                // Check exact match
                if (ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.contains(className)) {
                    return Class.forName(className);
                }
                
                // Check if it's an array type of allowed class
                if (className.startsWith("[L") && className.endsWith(";")) {
                    String componentType = className.substring(2, className.length() - 1);
                    if (ALLOWED_CLASS_NAMES.contains(componentType)) {
                        return Class.forName(className);
                    }
                }
                
                // Block all other classes including Runtime, ProcessBuilder, ClassLoader, etc.
                throw new ClassNotFoundException("Access to class " + className + " is not allowed");
            }
        };
        
        // Secure MemberAccess - allow public members only, deny private/protected
        SECURE_MEMBER_ACCESS = new MemberAccess() {
            @Override
            public Object setup(Map context, Object target, Member member, String propertyName) {
                return null;
            }
            
            @Override
            public void restore(Map context, Object target, Member member, String propertyName, Object state) {
            }
            
            @Override
            public boolean isAccessible(Map context, Object target, Member member, String propertyName) {
                return member != null && Modifier.isPublic(member.getModifiers());
            }
        };
    }
